form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 7 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Sammy Suffarell at this track over 2130m in a 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on March 31 at $6. Then a handy effort when beaten by 7 m finishing third after being driven well back, behind Vinnies Star at this track over 1730m in a 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 7 at $13. Sure to be thereabouts again.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr6) over 1780m at Northam, beaten 13 m by American Typhoon (2:11.80) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 11 at $61. Better run anticipated this time.
